## [00:00 - 03:00]

Welcome to Advanced Influencer Marketing. This module is dedicated to getting your influences to convert at scale. And by at scale, I mean doubling down on the number of influences that you're working with and increasing the complexity of your influencer strategies. By the end, you'll be able to boost direct sale conversion, increase your following, and drive more traffic to your website. Not only using the power of Instagram, but also YouTube and Facebook as well. You'll have warm leads that have a greater LTV but cost less to convert because you've already built a strong relationship with them. According to MediaKicks, 90% of marketers actually consider influencer marketing the same, if not more effective when it comes to ROI than other marketing channels. And I'm living proof that it works, if done right. I've co-founded four multi-million dollar e-commerce brands and influencer marketing has been the cornerstone of their success. At SkinnyMeT, we were one of the first brands to really get into Instagram influencer marketing back in 2012. And at the fifth watches, we made a million dollars in sales in a single day using influencer marketing at scale. Now, over the years, I've collaborated with thousands of influencers for my own brands and I've also worked as an influencer for the likes of PayPal and Hewlett Packard. So having been on both sides of the market, I created Hay Influencers, which is my self-serve influencer marketing platform and agency to give high-growth brands a helping hand with their influencer strategy. Now I've seen and helped hundreds of brands work with thousands of influencers. This has given me insight into the exact steps that you need to follow to create an effective influencer marketing campaign. Now you've probably worked with influencers in the past. It may have gotten you some sales or it may have resulted in no sales, but more brand visibility. The goal of this module is to give you a sure-fire path to sales. We'll get your business to that level by diving into the main platforms for influencer marketing. These are Instagram. We'll go deep into the different types of macro and micro influencer campaigns and how to manage relationships with dozens, if not hundreds of influencers at once. Facebook will cover how you can use influencer-amplified content on Facebook to drive conversions and YouTube. We've found that YouTube influencers convert on average four times better than those on Facebook or Instagram. I'll teach you how to inject your brand into YouTube with proper product reviews, product placement and giveaway strategies. Something to remember here is that this isn't a 101 class. We won't teach you the basics of influencer marketing. I won't teach you how to reach out to influencers, collaborate with them and pricing around that. You've been there and done that before.

## [03:00 - 03:18]

And if you haven't, I'd strongly recommend that you go through the influencer marketing module in the start and scale course. The biggest thing that I want you to keep in mind is that influencer marketing shouldn't just grow your brand's following. It should result in direct sales. That said, let's dive in.
